meaning: adj.芝麻籽状的,籽骨的n.籽骨
examples: The adductor hallucis or the sesamoid is not necessarily interfered in patients with slight or moderate hallux valgus.
Objective To investigate a method to distinguish avulsion fracture from sesamoid, accessory bone, and permanent osteoepiphyte.
Walton missed Sunday's game because of sesamoiditis, an inflammation of the sesamoid bones that began in his right foot last Friday.
Barbaro sustained a broken cannon bone above the ankle, a broken sesamoid bone behind the ankle and a broken long pastern bone below the ankle.
